name: Swing365
about: Swing365 offers a state-of-the-art golf simulator experience in a warm and inviting private club atmosphere. The venue is built on a membership-based community model, providing members with 24/7 access to individual simulator suites that can be booked online. It combines premium technology with a social, accessible environment for golfers looking to play, practice, or relax. Pricing operates on a hybrid model, with hourly drop-in sessions available alongside membership options that include various time allowances.
why_golfers_like_it: Full Swing™ Pro Series simulator with advanced infrared technology and 95+ global course options
Membership-based access providing flexible 24/7 booking and privacy in individual suites
Option to bring your own food and beverages for a customized, comfortable experience
Detailed ball flight data helps players practice effectively and translate skills to the course

food_and_drink.notes: Patrons can bring their own food.
Patrons can bring their own beverages (BYOB).

simulator_hardware.notes: Widescreen simulator with 688 infrared sensors for ball flight measurement

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The provided content does not specify whether clubs are provided or required to be brought by the golfer.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes, Swing365 allows patrons to bring their own food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: A standard drop-in session is limited to 60 minutes. For members, time allowances vary, with some having 90 or 120 minutes per day.

faq.question: Is Swing365 kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The provided content does not specify whether the venue is kid-friendly or has amenities for children.
